description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided cylindrical head with intricate gold geometric patterns and a deep maroon finish, giving it a decorative yet functional appearance. The head is connected to a central, angular gold and maroon core, which transitions into a long, straight handle. The handle is black with a ribbed texture, likely designed for enhanced grip, and is capped with a gold and maroon end piece that mirrors the ornate style of the head. The overall design suggests a blend of ceremonial and practical use, with a focus on durability and visual impact. The hammer's proportions and detailing indicate it is intended for heavy-duty tasks or as a display piece in an urban or themed environment. No visible signs of wear or branding are present, and the object appears pristine.
description: An ornate, double-sided hammer with a gold and maroon cylindrical head and a ribbed black handle, featuring intricate geometric designs and a robust build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical double-sided head with gold geometric patterns and the full length of the ribbed handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the circular end of the hammer head and the thickness of the handle, with less detail visible on the head's face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite side of the double-sided head and the handle's end cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other circular end of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, ribbed black handle with a likely rubberized or textured grip for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided cylindrical sledge-type head with ornate gold geometric patterns and flat striking faces.
